title: Denise's Saltine Toffee Cookies
description: Addictive saltine cracker toffee — crackers under a boiled brown-sugar-butter toffee, topped with melted chocolate and pecans, then broken into pieces.
instructions: Line a cookie sheet with saltine crackers in a single layer.
In a saucepan, combine the sugar and butter. Bring to a boil and boil for 3 minutes. Immediately pour over the saltines and spread to cover the crackers completely.

Bake at 400°F (205°C) for 5 to 6 minutes. Remove from oven and sprinkle chocolate chips over the top. Let sit for 5 minutes. Spread the melted chocolate and top with chopped nuts. Cool completely and break into pieces.
